latin: Quomodo tu vales? Iosephus hoc dicebat omnibus puellis quas videbat. vocem suam gravem faciebat et subridebat. putabat se irresistibilem esse.

glossary.vales: are you doing, are you well

questions.prompt: What does Joey think about himself?

translation: How you doin'? Joey said this to every girl he saw. He would make his voice deep and smile. He thought himself irresistible.
